question.label: Design impact
question.name: How do you see your design work influencing the team's success?
question.description: Evaluates the influence of design work on overall team outcomes.

assessment.note: The answer 'Yeah its fine' is non-engaged and provides no signal about design impact.

new_queue.label: Communication clarity
new_queue.name: Where do you find communication around your design work most challenging?

new_queue.label: Leadership growth
new_queue.name: What areas of design leadership do you want to develop further?

new_queue.label: Session closer
new_queue.name: What's the one thing you want to focus on improving before we next meet?
